title: Java Indexed Loop
description: Practice indexed for loops with break and continue.
learningGoals: Type a classic indexed for loop.
Use continue and break for loop control.

completionChecks.explanation: 8 adds (total 8), -1 hits continue and is skipped, 10 adds (total 18), then 0 hits break before adding, so it prints 18.

completionChecks.prompt: Which statement skips only the current loop iteration?
completionChecks.explanation: continue skips the rest of the current iteration and proceeds to the next; break exits the loop entirely.

completionChecks.prompt: What happens when the loop reaches the 0 at scores[3]?
choices: continue skips to a fifth element
0 is added and then the loop exits
break exits the loop before adding the 0
completionChecks.explanation: The equality test for 0 executes before total += scores[i], so break leaves the loop without adding the sentinel value.
